title: Pillai College Merit List 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: Pillai College Merit List 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: Pillai College Merit List 2026 Out for UG admissions at Pillai College of Arts, Commerce and Science on the official website - pcacs.ac.in. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the Pillai College merit list 2026.

content.text: Pillai College Merit List 2026 has been released for undergraduate admissions at Pillai College of Arts, Commerce and Science (PCACS), New Panvel for the 2026-27 academic session. Candidates who applied for various UG programmes such as B.Com, B.Sc, BMS, BBA, BCA and other courses under Mumbai University can now check the PCACS first merit list online. Pillai College Merit List 2026 has been released online on the official website - https://pcacs.ac.in/ through the dedicated admission portal admission.pcacs.ac.in.

Students can log in to the admission portal or visit the college website to view and download the course-wise first merit list PDF. After checking their name and details in the merit list, candidates must verify all information carefully and contact the college admission office immediately in case of any discrepancy or error.

sections.heading: Pillai College Merit List 2026 Key Highlights

content.text: Pillai College of Arts, Commerce and Science has published the first merit list for 2026 admissions based on candidates' performance in the qualifying examination and eligibility criteria prescribed by the college. The merit list determines provisional admission for various UG programmes, and shortlisted candidates must complete document verification and fee payment within the stipulated schedule. Students can access the latest updates, merit list links and admission instructions through the official PCACS website and admission portal.

rows: Pillai College of Arts, Commerce and Science (PCACS), New Panvel
Pillai College Merit List 2026 (First Merit List)
B.Com, BMS, B.Sc, BBA, BCA and other UG programmes
Marks in qualifying exam as per eligibility criteria

sections.heading: Pillai College Merit List 2026 Direct Link

content.text: Pillai College has activated the online admission portal for candidates to check the Pillai College Merit List 2026 for all undergraduate courses. Using the official website and admission link, students can directly access the latest merit list, cut off details and admission schedule. Candidates must use the links given below to quickly reach the merit list page and confirm their selection status for the preferred course.

links.label: Pillai College Merit List 2026 - UG Admissions (All Courses)

sections.heading: How to Download Pillai College Merit List 2026

content.text: Follow these easy steps to check and download Pillai College Merit List 2026 online:

items: Visit the official Pillai College website - https://pcacs.ac.in/
On the homepage, click on the "Admissions" or "Merit List 2026" link, or go to the admission portal admission.pcacs.ac.in.
Select the relevant course such as B.Com, BMS, B.Sc, BBA, BCA or other UG programme.
Click on the Pillai College 2026 first merit list link for your course.
The merit list will open as a PDF or webpage showing candidate names, application numbers, and cut off details.
Search your name or application number in the list to check if you have been shortlisted.
Download and save the merit list PDF and note the further instructions regarding document verification, fee payment and admission confirmation.

structured_links.label: Pillai College Merit List 2026 - UG Admissions (All Courses)
